## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / community
- [ ] Tests / CI

## Test plan

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -q` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests when behavior changed
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or large ONNX binaries committed
- [ ] Optional extras remain lazy-imported (base `pip install prismguard` still works)
- [ ] No unverified marketing / benchmark claims added
